column1: Nancy walked down the platform beside Mother to where the guard____________, and when Mother________to speak to the guard my little sister__________at all. (STAND/STOP/NOT TALK)

By asking them question, Socrates___________people think about things they____________before. (MAKE/NOT NOTICE)
There is a story that says Newton_____________under an apple tree when an apple_________him on the head. He wondered why the apple___________down. (SIT/STRIKE/FALL)
